props.location: Which side of the trigger the bubble sits on — top (default), bottom, left, right.
props.color: Background fill — a theme name (primary, success…) or any CSS color. Dark by default.
props.border: A light, outlined style instead of a solid fill.
props.borderThick: A light style with a thick accent edge on the pointing side.
props.shadow: A light, elevated style (surface fill + shadow).
props.loading: Show a spinner and dim the content.
props.interactivity: Keep the bubble open while the pointer is over it (for links/buttons inside).
props.notHover: Don't open on hover — drive visibility with v-model instead.
props.offset: Gap between trigger and bubble, in px.
props.modelValue: Controlled open state (use v-model, with not-hover).

events.update:modelValue: Emitted when the tooltip opens or closes.
